title: Istoriya Asi Klyachinoy, kotoraya lyubila, da ne vyshla zamuzh
original_title: История Аси Клячиной, которая любила, да не вышла замуж
overview: Asya, a lame collective farmer, is in love with the father of her unborn child. However, he does not reciprocate, leaving her forced to choose between a loveless marriage to another suitor, or single motherhood.
